plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了人类与技术的关系，认为人类本质上一直与机器相似或相关。它可能讨论在数字时代，社交媒体和技术如何影响我们的身份和互动方式，挑战传统的人类与机器界限。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the relationship between humans and technology, suggesting that humans have always been similar to or connected with machines. It likely discusses how social media and technology in the digital age affect our identities and interactions, challenging traditional boundaries between humans and machines.
research_direction_zh: 研究后人类主义、数字文化中的人类与技术融合，以及社交媒体对身份建构的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on posthumanism, human-technology integration in digital culture, and the impact of social media on identity construction.
